description: Pinned moshi.cpp (tools/bench/moshi_reference_ref.txt) mimi encode/decode reference driver compared against the EMEL-owned mimi codec runner. Two-lane isolation: the reference driver is a separate executable; the EMEL lane links only emel. Note: the reference executes ggml's f16 conv pipeline while the EMEL lane currently computes in f32, so mimi_compare reports code-match similarity and decode PSNR without claiming kernel parity until the EMEL codec consumes the f16 operand class.
